org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange

类 Response

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange.Response

  • public class Response
extends Object
    Response

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      static byte BAD_REQUEST
      request format error.
      static byte BAD_RESPONSE
      response format error.
      static byte CHANNEL_INACTIVE
      channel inactive, directly return the unfinished requests.
      static byte CLIENT_ERROR
      internal server error.
      static byte CLIENT_TIMEOUT
      client side timeout.
      static byte OK
      ok.
      static byte SERVER_ERROR
      internal server error.
      static byte SERVER_THREADPOOL_EXHAUSTED_ERROR
      server side threadpool exhausted and quick return.
      static byte SERVER_TIMEOUT
      server side timeout.
      static byte SERVICE_ERROR
      service error.
      static byte SERVICE_NOT_FOUND
      service not found.
